news.summary: At the Cloud Next '25 event in Las Vegas, Intuit Inc. news.summary: On May 13, 2025, three major companies will hold their annual general meetings using a virtual format. Topicus.com Inc. news.summary: In Halkirk, Scotland, Highland Broadband has revolutionized internet connectivity by implementing Adtran's XGS-PON fiber access technology. This upgrade comes after Halkirk was labeled as the UK's slowest broadband location in a 2023 study by Broadband Genie. The new network now offers Gigabit speeds to residents and businesses, marking a significant improvement from the previous slow and unreliable connections in the village. This transformation has effectively eliminated the digital barriers that hindered progress in the community.
news.headline: Highland Broadband upgrades Halkirk, Scotland, UK's slowest broadband town with Gigabit fiber, courtesy of Adtran.93 characters.

news.summary: The gender pay gap has decreased to its lowest point in the past five years, according to the latest data released by Kruze Consulting based in San Francisco. Kruze Consulting is a prominent startup accounting and CFO consulting company catering to over 800 venture-funded startup clients. They have recently published their 7th annual CEO Salary Report, which highlights the current trend in executive compensation.

news.summary: In Las Vegas on April 9, 2025, Google Cloud revealed the successful outcomes of its partnership with Verizon, demonstrating the enhancements in customer experience. The collaboration involved utilizing Google Cloud's generative AI, powered by Gemini technology. This integration brought about notable advancements, with key improvements seen in areas such as customer service and efficiency. The innovative solutions implemented through this partnership have greatly benefitted Verizon, elevating its services and operations.

news.summary: On April 9, 2025, Immunic, Inc. disclosed the pricing of a new offering. The company, traded on Nasdaq under the symbol IMUX, focuses on developing oral small molecule treatments for chronic inflammatory and autoimmune conditions. This biotechnology firm is advancing a clinical portfolio for such diseases.
news.headline: Immunic, Inc. raises $5.1 million in offering led by Aberdeen Investments for clinical pipeline of therapies.

news.summary: According to a June 2024 report by Standard Chartered Bank and Synpulse, tokenized real-world assets (RWAs) in blockchain-based finance are predicted to potentially surpass $30 trillion by 2034. This sentiment was echoed at a panel at Paris Blockchain Week 2025, with major industry executives discussing the future of RWAs. While most supported the $30 trillion estimate, Securitize COO Michael Sonnenshein expressed skepticism, suggesting that the number might not be achieved due to existing systems working well for traditional assets. Sonnenshein, a former CEO of Grayscale Investments, remains bullish on RWAs but questioned whether tokenization is the best route for real estate ownership. Despite acknowledging the benefits of tokenizing real estate, he argued that the onchain economy demands more liquid assets. In January, a local real estate developer in the UAE signed a $1 billion deal with RWA blockchain Mantra for tokenizing real estate, indicating a growing trend in this sector. Sonnenshein's conservative predictions and doubts about tokenizing real estate highlight differing perspectives within the industry.
news.headline: Real estate tokenization may not hit $30 trillion mark by 2034, exec Michael Sonnenshein suggests, skeptical on the trend.

news.summary: The report "Shop Stools & Benches Market - Focused Insights 2025-2030" has been recently included in ResearchAndMarkets.com's offerings. In 2024, the Shop Stools & Benches Market had a value of USD 1.56 billion, and it is estimated to grow to USD 1.85 billion by 2030, with a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of 2.88%. The global market report encompasses data on 25 vendors, indicating a competitive market landscape with key players such as Northern tools+Equipment, DeWalt, WEN, WorkPro.
news.headline: Global shop stools & benches market valued at USD 1.56 billion in 2024, projected to reach USD 1.85 billion by 2030 with a CAGR of 2.88%.
Jeffs’ Brands is getting closer to launching Fort's AI-driven pest control app with Apple App Store submission.

news.summary: Taylor Guitars has introduced a revolutionary neck design that offers unparalleled precision in adjusting string height with micro-accuracy. This innovation represents a significant milestone in the company's 50-year commitment to creating playable and serviceable guitars. The new design, patented by Taylor, is a game-changer and is set to enhance the playing experience for musicians. The announcement was made in El Cajon, California, on April 8, 2025. This development solidifies Taylor Guitars' position as a frontrunner in the industry, demonstrating their ongoing dedication to innovation and quality craftsmanship.
news.headline: Taylor Guitars introduces revolutionary Action Control Neck™ for precise string height adjustment, marking 50 years of innovation.

news.summary: Featuring waterproof work boots, hard-wearing insulated gloves, and durable bib overalls and work jackets designed to withstand harsh weather conditions, the latest FrostFlex™ System will be exhibited at Booth #534. news.summary: The National Association of State Boating Law Administrators (NASBLA), established in 1960, has evolved from a modest assembly of state representatives to a prominent figure in promoting recreational boating safety. In its 65-year history, NASBLA has broadened its scope to encompass law enforcement efforts.

news.summary: American Cruise Lines has unveiled a series of Extended Cruises consisting of 50 days or more to commemorate the United States' 250th Birthday in 2026. These unparalleled U.S. River cruises will be the longest available on the market. In the upcoming year, American Cruise Lines will introduce a remarkable 52-Day Great River cruise experience.
news.headline: American Cruise Lines introduces 50-Day+ U.S. River Cruises to celebrate 250th Birthday of USA, longest in the market.

news.summary: Rare Cannabinoid Company is starting the 420 season with exclusive deals on their nano THC + CBC Mood Mints and CBDV Oil Tinctures. Customers can also get a complimentary pack of THCV Gummies on orders exceeding $75. The promotion is in effect from April 8, 2025, in Honolulu.

news.summary: In New York, Rondah AI, a specialized AI platform for dental service organizations (DSOs), revealed a pre-seed funding round amounting to $1.8 million. These strategic additions emphasize Motif's dedication to transforming the future of the industry.

news.summary: In Austin, Texas, at Google Cloud Next 2025, CrowdStrike, listed on NASDAQ as CRWD, was named the recipient of the prestigious 2025 Google Cloud Security Partner of the Year Award for Workload Security. Alongside this recognition, CrowdStrike disclosed its intensified collaboration with Google Cloud to offer comprehensive security for AI advancements, covering the entire process from code development to cloud deployment, through CrowdStrike Falcon® Cloud Security. This partnership enhancement ensures top-tier security for Google Cloud users.
news.headline: CrowdStrike named 2025 Google Cloud Security Partner of the Year for Workload Security; secures AI innovation. Expands partnership with Google Cloud.

news.summary: In Seattle, according to a report by Redfin, the total value of homes in majority-Hispanic neighborhoods increased by 4.2% year over year to reach $2 trillion in 2024. However, areas with a majority of Black, Asian, or white homeowners, or mixed racial demographics, experienced even faster growth in total home values. Notably, the total home value in majority-white neighborhoods had the highest growth rate at 5.4%, reaching $40.4 trillion in 2024, outpacing the growth in Hispanic neighborhoods.
news.headline: Hispanic home values surpass $2 trillion, growing by 4.2% in 2024, trailing other ethnic groups. White neighborhoods saw fastest growth to $40.4 trillion.

news.summary: Rubrik (NYSE: RBRK) based in Palo Alto, California, revealed its latest project Rubrik Annapurna, which aims to facilitate secure data access and utilization for AI applications by enterprises. This initiative will allow Rubrik users to leverage its features alongside Google Agentspace, enabling support for enterprise AI models to access, manage, and safeguard confidential data with high-security standards like Zero Trust on Google Cloud. The collaborative effort is expected to provide a seamless solution suitable for businesses looking to enhance their AI capabilities.
news.headline: Rubrik partners with Google Agentspace to enhance AI security, access, and data protection, benefitting enterprises.
